landing.pageDescription: Core Solution is a multi-tenant SaaS platform that unifies tenant isolation, automation workflows, and real-time analytics in a single console.

hero.subtitle: Core Solution unifies tenant isolation, automation workflows, and real-time analytics in a single console — built for B2B operations at any scale.

isolation.title: Multi-Tenant Isolation
isolation.desc: Complete isolation of data, permissions, and domains per tenant

workflow.title: Automation Workflows
workflow.desc: Automate repetitive operations without writing code

analytics.title: Real-Time Analytics
analytics.desc: Track every business metric from a single console

finalCta.title: Run every tenant on a single, scalable console.
finalCta.subtitle: Try Core Solution free for 14 days. No credit card required.

onboarding.pageSubtitle: Set up your consultation center in just a few minutes.

v2.title: Start your tenant registration
v2.subtitle: Enter your business info in 1 minute to get started
v2.contactSubtitle: Enter your service domain and contact information
v2.accountSubtitle: Create the first administrator account for the admin panel
v2.termsAgreement: I agree to the Terms of Service.
v2.privacyAgreement: I agree to the Privacy Policy.
v2.marketingAgreement: (Optional) I agree to receive marketing information.
v2.completeMessage: After internal review, your tenant will be approved within 1-2 business days. We will notify you at the administrator email when approved.
v2.valuePropDesc: Integrate your business operations with Core Solution

onboarding.errorDomainFormat: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens (-) are allowed.
onboarding.errorDomainTaken: This domain is already in use.
onboarding.errorDomainCheckFailed: An error occurred while checking the domain.
onboarding.errorTermsRequired: You must agree to the Terms of Service.
onboarding.errorPrivacyRequired: You must agree to the Privacy Policy.
onboarding.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
onboarding.errorSubmitFailed: An error occurred while processing your application. Please try again later.
